protocol: LORO partial target calibration with spatial radio-map interpolation. M target cells are calibrated with K support samples per cell; RSSI prototypes for all target cells are spatially interpolated and used for nearest-prototype localization.

methods.NearestSpatial: Copy the RSSI prototype of the nearest calibrated cell.
methods.GP_RBF: Gaussian-process/RBF interpolation, kriging-like with fixed kernel.
